title: senecio oxyphyllus
intro: Senecio oxyphyllus, also known as Jacob's ladder or woolly Jacob's ladder, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio oxyphyllus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve breathing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Senecio oxyphyllus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
